sentences.translationEn: A small smile can change a person's mood.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ تَبْتَسِمُ يَشْعُرُ مَنْ حَوْلَكَ بِالأَمَانِ.
sentences.translation: Kada se nasmijehiš, oni oko tebe osjećaju se sigurno.
sentences.translationEn: When you smile, those around you feel safe.

sentences.arabic: ابْتَسَمَتْ رِيمُ لِزَمِيلَتِهَا الْجَدِيدَةِ فِي الصَّفِّ.
sentences.translation: Rim se nasmijehila svojoj novoj drugarici u razredu.
sentences.translationEn: Reem smiled at her new classmate in class.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرَتِ الزَّمِيلَةُ الْجَدِيدَةُ أَنَّ الْمَدْرَسَةَ لَيْسَتْ مُخِيفَةً.
sentences.translation: Nova drugarica je osjetila da škola nije strašna.
sentences.translationEn: The new classmate felt that the school was not scary.
